headline: McDonald's or Domino's: One of These Is a Screaming Buy Right Now
summary: Both are leaders within their area of fast food, but one stands out as the better buy.

headline: McDonald’s makes a big menu shift as beef prices rise
summary: Fast-food chains are increasingly leaning on chicken as beef prices rise “Right now, there is a tightness in the U.S. protein supply, especially where beef is concerned, due to reduced cattle herds that could go on for years before they’re replenished,” Bill Lapp, president of Omaha, Neb.-based ...
